ogTitle: Urangan vs Utchee Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Urangan and Utchee Creek.
heading: Urangan vs Utchee Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Urangan, Queensland and Utchee Creek, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Utchee Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Urangan (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Urangan or Utchee Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Urangan has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Utchee Creek scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Urangan scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Utchee Creek scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Urangan or Utchee Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Utchee Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
